case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,153.00 U.S ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AMY SHEARER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES (TRANSACTION ID # 62172795) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-26-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ROLLINS, BRYAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $576.00 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT BRYAN ROLLINS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $577.00 U.S. CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATION WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy Shearer, Assistant District Attorney, appearing for Plaintiff PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Telephone 415-553-9706;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S unopposed Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
